## What pattern should we detect?

Describe the vulnerability or bug pattern.

## Vulnerable code example

```js
// example of the bad pattern
```

## Secure version (the fix)

```js
// what the user should write instead
```

## OWASP category (if known)

e.g. A03 Injection, A07 Auth Failures, A10 SSRF

## How common is this?

- [ ] Very common — appears in most projects
- [ ] Common — appears in some projects
- [ ] Niche — specific framework/use case

## Severity (your opinion)

- [ ] 🔴 Critical (must fix before deploy)
- [ ] 🟡 Warning (should fix but not blocking)

## References

Links to OWASP / Snyk / blog posts that describe this pattern (optional)
